rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies prior works but doesn't map them comprehensively.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations and suggests specific prior works, not fully verified.
rationale.RX.1: Marks confidence levels for each recommendation and points out missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
